ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture used in the model (e.g., CNN, RNN) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "num_images" INTEGER /* Number of images in the dataset */,
  "image_size" TEXT /* Average image size in the dataset (e.g., 224x224) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs the model was trained */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., 'running', 'completed', 'failed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment parameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., 'batch_size', 'learning_rate') */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_parameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the metrics */,
  "bleu_1" REAL /* BLEU-1 score */,
  "bleu_2" REAL /* BLEU-2 score */,
  "bleu_3" REAL /* BLEU-3 score */,
  "bleu_4" REAL /* BLEU-4 score */,
  "meteor" REAL /* METEOR score */,
  "cider" REAL /* CIDEr score */,
  "rouge" REAL /* ROUGE score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, developer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the documentation */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of documentation (e.g., report, readme) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the documentation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the documentation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the documentation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
